mapper.sql: id, code, name, description, system_prompt, model, allowed_tools::text AS allowed_tools, chat_options::text AS chat_options, intent_tree::text AS intent_tree, built_in, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO agent_template ( id, code, name, description, system_prompt, model, allowed_tools, chat_options, intent_tree, built_in, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( CAST(#{id} AS uuid), #{code}, #{name}, #{description}, #{systemPrompt}, #{modelValue}, CAST(#{allowedToolsJson} AS jsonb), CAST(#{chatOptionsJson} AS jsonb), CAST(#{intentTreeJson} AS jsonb), #{builtIn}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM agent_template ORDER BY built_in DESC, name ASC, created_at ASC

SELECT
FROM agent_template WHERE id = CAST(#{id} AS uuid)
mapper.update: UPDATE agent_template SET code = #{code}, name = #{name}, description = #{description}, system_prompt = #{systemPrompt}, model = #{modelValue}, allowed_tools = CAST(#{allowedToolsJson} AS jsonb), chat_options = CAST(#{chatOptionsJson} AS jsonb), intent_tree = CAST(#{intentTreeJson} AS jsonb), built_in = #{builtIn}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = CAST(#{id} AS uuid)
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM agent_template WHERE id = CAST(#{id} AS uuid)
